cross_scene_arcs.title: Securing Doctor's Visit
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Janine agrees to Betts's plan to trick Nick into a medical check and successfully arranges for Dr. St. Luc to visit their home.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Concerned wife seeking medical help for husband's lumps
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Home visit scheduled with Dr. St. Luc
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Nick will cooperate with the examination and the diagnosis outcome

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting Tudor's Abnormality
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Janine's attempts to assist Tudor are rejected, leading to the discovery of abnormal lumps and a creature emerging from his mouth, causing her to flee in terror.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Wife attempting to help husband with health issue
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Fleeing apartment after horrifying supernatural revelation
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Nature of the entity in Tudor and immediate safety concerns

cross_scene_arcs.title: Parasite Infection and Transmission
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Seeking refuge with Betts, Janine is forcibly infected with a parasite; she later transmits it to Dr. St. Luc during a forced kiss at a pool.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Distressed and seeking help from trusted friend Betts
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Parasite transferred to St. Luc, with calm demeanor post-transmission
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Effects of the infection on Janine and her role in spreading the parasite

cross_scene_arcs.title: Uncovering the Parasite Mystery
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: St. Luc learns of Annabelle's link to Hobbes's misconduct, examines victims with abdominal growths, identifies a pattern among multiple men, and begins investigating Forsythe's attack as potentially connected.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Aware of Annabelle's photo and Hobbes's misconduct but uncommitted to Rollo's research.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Actively investigating Forsythe's attack, suspecting a tie to the abdominal growths and parasite theory.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The exact cause and nature of the abdominal growths linked to Annabelle.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Partnership and Disclosure with Rollo
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Rollo proposes collaboration to St. Luc, who later hears from Rollo about Hobbes's fraudulent activities, and they share findings on the victims with abdominal growths.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Approached by Rollo for a partnership on controversial research.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Informed of Hobbes's fraud and collaborating with Rollo on the case findings.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How Hobbes's deception impacts their ongoing work and trust in each other.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Investigator to Infected Fugitive
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: St. Luc kills an attacker in self-defense, discovers Forsythe infected with parasites, is forcibly infected himself during a confrontation, and leads a convoy escape from Starliner Towers.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Shocked and fleeing after killing an intruder in a violent struggle.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Infected by a parasite and driving the lead car in a convoy逃离 the Towers.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The extent of his physical transformation and what actions he will take post-infection.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Secret Visit and Murder Discovery
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tudor uses a key to secretly enter Annabelle's apartment, discovers her and Hobbes dead, and leaves in physical distress.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: In elevator ascending to top floor with a key.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Staggering out of Annabelle's apartment after discovering the bodies.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Who killed Annabelle and Hobbes, and is Tudor in danger?

cross_scene_arcs.title: Health Crisis and Marital Strain
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tudor's abdominal pain escalates to vomiting blood and developing lumps; he hides his condition from Janine, leading to her horror and rejection when she discovers the lumps.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Pleading with Janine after she recoils from feeling his lumps.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The cause of Tudor's illness and the future of his marriage to Janine.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Violent Defense of Parasites
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: In a delirious state, Tudor violently attacks Rollo with pliers to stop him from destroying the parasites under his skin.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Interacting deliriously with lumps and rejecting Janine's help.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Assaulting Rollo on the floor with pliers.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The ongoing struggle with Rollo and the nature of the parasites.
